title: oxalis corniculata var. stricta
intro: Oxalis corniculata var. stricta is a variety of the common wood sorrel plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxalis corniculata var. stricta include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
